content.text:
All 5 tests pass (4 previous + 1 new). The minimal change was adding `potion: 40` to the lookup table.

Verification: 40 (base) + 4 (10% newcomer surcharge) + 5 (processing fee) = 49. Correct.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added `potion: 40` to the `BASE_PREMIUM_BY_TYPE` lookup table in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_10-10-59_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts`
- Result: All 5 tests pass (44 todo)
- Approach: Single-line addition to the existing lookup table — leverages the existing premium calculation logic without introducing new code paths or branches. This is the simplest possible change to satisfy the test.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
